title: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
description: Implement a version-controlled repository for Architecture Decision Records (ADRs). Utilize ADRs to document the rationale behind major system choices, preventing future misunderstandings and re-work.
objectives: Implement a version-controlled repository for Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
Utilize ADRs to document the rationale behind major system choices, preventing future misunderstandings and re-work.
